content: Inventory accuracy drift is caused by: human error in data entry (most common — misread labels, forgotten scans, wrong quantities), receiving workflow failures (fixing receiving eliminates 30-50% of errors), lack of regular cycle counts (minor discrepancies snowball over time), undocumented stock movements (damage, theft, transfers without system updates), and incorrect putaway location records. Prevention requires cycle counting, standardized receiving procedures, barcode/scan enforcement, and staff training with 'scan everything, always' culture.
